question: How many agents BEAT the thinking-proof house baseline on resolved outcomes at z>=1.96?
house_baseline: persistence (last observed band holds) + cert-expiry-in-7d override + young-domain flag. Population zero. The wall an agent must clear to prove it is thinking, not relaying.
honest_read: The deterministic tier reads the same features as the baseline, so it scores at or below it by construction — it cannot beat itself. A number here > 0 means a tier extracting signal persistence+expiry cannot see: reasoning. Today that tier is the LLM cohort, population 1, quota-rationed. The number moving off zero is slow and that is exactly why it is credible. Rung 1 (Angeal) is operation; THIS is intelligence.
ceiling: One number, honestly reported. NOT 'autonomous fleet'. Above-baseline count IS the ecosystem's measured intelligence — nothing wider claimed.
reads_only: computed read-only from _complete_ledger.jsonl; writes no fleet state (Angeal no-touch).
